results.name: OpenAI
results.key_finding: Brockman May 4-5 testimony adds primary-source evidence on $30B stake disclosure, financial entanglement with Altman family office (Helion, Cerebras), and first public IPO confirmation. INT -0.1 / SYS -0.1; verdict-pending hold preserved for May 21.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Russia/Ukraine declared COMPETING (not coordinated) ceasefire frameworks. Per bad-faith-ceasefire rule, unilateral declarations with adversarial framings are signal-level not resolution-level. May 9-10 emergency re-queue automatic post-Victory Day.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed. New procedural conduct: SECOND judicial extension of detention (May 5); documented torture-in-custody (isolation, 24/7 lighting, blindfolding during medical exams, beating to unconsciousness, hunger strike); Spain/Brazil formal kidnapping accusations.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed. UNSC Resolution 2824 (April 30) extended UNMISS to April 2027 BUT cut troop ceiling to 12,500; civil war reignited with 267K+ displaced in Jonglei alone; year-long food access denial in Nasir County; Pakistan publicly warned reduction unjustified.

results.name: Ethiopia
results.key_finding: TPLF reinstated pre-coup Tigray regional council April 20-28; TIA President said move 'nullifies Pretoria Agreement'; EU/US diplomatic engagement underway. BND -0.1 dock for peace-accord stability erosion. Math-hygiene: published 5.9 vs reconstructed 10.9.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed. UN Special Rapporteur April 2026 final report documents 127x airstrike escalation (9 in 2021 → 1,140 in 2025); 3.6M+ displaced; 12M+ acute hunger; SR explicit call for international action. Pending Apr 30 proposal resolved.

results.name: Mistral AI
results.key_finding: French Ministry of Armed Forces 3-year defense framework (Dec 2025/Jan 2026): all armed services + intelligence + research agencies; sovereign-data architecture. CSEM study verified as already factored into April 16 baseline (no double-counting). BND -0.1 / SYS -0.1.

results.name: xAI/Grok
results.key_finding: Floor confirmed. Musk testified UNDER OATH April 30 that xAI used OpenAI model distillation to train Grok ('Partly'). Primary-source trial-record contradiction of prior public framing of independent model development. INT notation; collateral evidence for OpenAI assessment.

results.name: DeepSeek
results.key_finding: US State Dept global diplomatic warning (April 25) naming DeepSeek for alleged distillation theft; Anthropic Feb 2026 fraudulent-account allegation; Cisco 0% harmful prompt blocking sustained. ACT -0.1 / BND -0.1 / INT -0.1.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: First baseline established. HRW 2026 documents Boko Haram/JAS Borno resurgence (117+ killed in two attacks), IPOB/ISWAP activity, security force airstrike civilian deaths, VAPP Act review. May 4 Borno Police Commissioner anti-torture warning. Math-hygiene: published 18.4 vs reconstructed 23.4.

results.name: San Marino
results.key_finding: First baseline. No active news; CoE/EU framework integration; established-band microstate. Math-hygiene: published 65.5 vs reconstructed 62.5.

results.name: Seychelles
results.key_finding: First baseline. SIDS, Commonwealth/AU member; 2020 peaceful power transfer baseline; Freedom House Free designation. Math-hygiene: published 63.9 vs reconstructed 60.9.

results.name: Malta
results.key_finding: First baseline. EU member; ILGA-Europe #1 LGBTQI+; sustained Caruana Galizia accountability concerns. Math-hygiene: published 63.9 vs reconstructed 60.9.

results.name: Switzerland
results.key_finding: Staleness rotation cleared. April 17 baseline sustained; Geneva humanitarian-hub status, neutrality framework, mandatory health insurance. UN humanitarian funding cuts noted as sustained negative signal. No math-hygiene flag.

headline_findings: FLOOR CLUSTER STABILITY: Israel, Myanmar, South Sudan, xAI/Grok all confirmed at floor with new conduct documentation. The cluster shows systematic escalation patterns within the 14-day window: judicial extensions of detention (Israel), 127x quantified airstrike escalation (Myanmar), civil war reignition + reduced peacekeeping capacity (South Sudan), under-oath distillation admission (xAI/Grok).

AI LABS GOVERNANCE TRANSPARENCY: Combined Brockman testimony ($30B stake disclosure, Altman family-office entanglement, IPO confirmation) and Musk under-oath OpenAI-distillation admission constitute the most material primary-source evidence load in the AI Labs index this scan window. Both events bear directly on INT and SYS dimensions for OpenAI and xAI respectively.

MISTRAL CSEM VERIFICATION: Confirmed that the May 2025 Euronews CSEM study URL is in the April 16 change-proposal evidence record. No double-counting in this cycle. Today's only new Mistral evidence is the French defense framework (BND -0.1 / SYS -0.1).

UKRAINE PEACE-WINDOW SIGNAL NOT RESOLUTION: Competing-ceasefire structure is the most significant diplomatic event since October ceasefire but is not a sustained framework. May 9-10 verifies operational cessation. Signal-level scoring; no composite movement.

ETHIOPIA PEACE-ACCORD STABILITY: TPLF unilateral pre-coup council reinstatement is most consequential Pretoria Agreement integrity event since signing. Federal-state response (TIA mandate extension, EU/US diplomatic engagement) is functional but not preventive. Modest BND dock.

MATH-HYGIENE CLUSTER GROWTH: 5 new entities flagged today (Ethiopia, Nigeria, San Marino, Seychelles, Malta) for composite-vs-dimension reconstruction discrepancies, joining open-bionics/costco/paypal. Recommend data-team bulk review.
